title: Policy
description: A Policy defines who is permitted to perform a Capability. Policies are checked before Rules — there is no point evaluating business conditions if the actor is not authorized.

capability.description: The Capability this policy applies to, expressed as Noun.Verb.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of who is permitted to perform this capability.

allow.description: The actors permitted to perform this capability. An actor matching any entry is allowed.

role.description: A named role that is permitted.

ownership.description: When true, the actor must be the owner of the noun instance.
